headline: 3 Well-Known Companies Getting Hit By The K-Shaped Economy
summary: Lennar, Nike, and Dave & Buster's exemplify the struggles of consumer-facing sectors in today's K-shaped U.S. economy. Read the full analysis here.

headline: Citigroup Maintains Buy on Datadog, Raises Price Target to $270
summary: Citigroup  analyst Fatima Boolani   maintains Datadog (NASDAQ:DDOG) with a Buy and raises the price target from $218 to $270.
